positive: A retro-futuristic, vaporwave-style illustration of a chrome sports car driving through a neon-lit cityscape at sunset. Incorporate palm tree silhouettes, grid patterns, and glowing magenta and cyan hues. Vector art aesthetic, highly stylized, 1980s synthwave poster quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, messy lines
